source_intake_record.raw_question_text:
A regular octagon is folded exactly in half three times until a triangle is obtained. The bottom corner of the triangle is then cut off with a cut perpendicular to one side of the triangle as shown.
<image1>
Which of the following will be seen when the triangle is unfolded?
<image2>

Answer field contains only the choice label.

issues: Structured choice option content is not provided; only choice_count=5 and the answer label are available, and metadata notes options are only labeled A-E without textual option content.

image_dependency: question_text explicitly refers to a fold-and-cut diagram with 'as shown' and asks what will be seen when unfolded
answer choices are only labels A-E, so the visual option content is not available in text
multi_step: question_text requires tracking three sequential folds of a regular octagon
question_text then applies an additional geometric transformation: a corner is cut off perpendicular to one side
solving requires mentally unfolding the final triangle and matching the resulting shape to one of the options
verifiability: answer_manifest indicates answer_present=true and answer_type=choice, with final answer given as a single option label
registry_passed=true, so core assets are registered and available
the task has a definite multiple-choice target, but verification is limited because the structured content of choices is not provided in text and depends on the image
